dashboard.label: Alerts And Saved Searches
dashboard.description: Disabled-by-default local alert content and the supporting saved searches for investigation.

html.p: This app now ships a bounded local alert pack across audit, gateway, diagnostics, and metrics signals. The packaged alerts are disabled by default, run on a 5-minute schedule with a 15-minute lookback when enabled, and do not configure external actions by default.

search.query: | makeresults count=7 | streamstats count as row | eval alert_name=case( row=1, "DefenseClaw Alert - Repeated Deny Activity", row=2, "DefenseClaw Alert - Enforcement Action Detected", row=3, "DefenseClaw Alert - High Severity Audit Burst", row=4, "OpenClaw Alert - Repeated Gateway Error Signature", row=5, "OpenClaw Alert - Queue Pressure Sustained", row=6, "OpenClaw Alert - Retry Storm Or Stuck Session", row=7, "OpenClaw Alert - High Cost Or Slow Run" ), signal_family=case( row=1 OR row=2 OR row=3, "audit", row=4, "gateway", row=5 OR row=6, "diagnostics + metrics", row=7, "metrics" ), threshold=case( row=1, "2 deny or block actions in one run/session", row=2, "any enforcement or quarantine action", row=3, "2 ERROR or CRITICAL events in one run/session", row=4, "2 identical gateway error signatures", row=5, "queue depth >= 5 or queue wait >= 120 ms in at least 2 matching events", row=6, "session.stuck or retry attempt >= 3", row=7, "cost >= 1.00 USD or duration >= 5000 ms" ), default_state="disabled", schedule="*/5 * * * *", lookback="last 15 minutes", drilldown_view=case( row=1 OR row=2 OR row=3, "Audit And Security", row=4, "Gateway Logs", row=5 OR row=6, "Queue And Runtime Health", row=7, "Model Usage And Cost" ) | table alert_name signal_family threshold default_state schedule lookback drilldown_view

`defenseclaw_repeated_deny_activity` | eval workflow="Repeated Deny Activity", threshold="deny_count >= 2" | table workflow run_id session_id deny_count actions severities threshold | append [ search `defenseclaw_enforcement_action_detected` | eval workflow="Enforcement Action Detected", threshold="any enforcement or quarantine action" | table workflow run_id session_id action severity actor target threshold ] | append [ search `defenseclaw_high_severity_burst` | eval workflow="High Severity Audit Burst", threshold="high_severity_count >= 2" | table workflow run_id session_id high_severity_count actions threshold ] | append [ search `openclaw_repeated_gateway_error_signature` | eval workflow="Repeated Gateway Error Signature", threshold="signature_count >= 2" | table workflow subsystem error_signature signature_count run_ids session_ids threshold ] | append [ search `openclaw_queue_pressure_sustained` | eval workflow="Queue Pressure Sustained", threshold="pressure_matches >= 2" | table workflow run_id session_id pressure_matches max_queue_depth max_wait_ms signal_sources threshold ] | append [ search `openclaw_retry_or_stuck_sessions` | eval workflow="Retry Storm Or Stuck Session", threshold="match_count >= 1" | table workflow run_id session_id match_count alert_reasons max_threshold_value threshold ] | append [ search `openclaw_high_cost_or_slow_run_alert` | eval workflow="High Cost Or Slow Run", threshold="cost_usd >= 1 or run_duration_ms >= 5000" | table workflow run_id session_id cost_usd run_duration_ms providers models threshold ] | head 25

| makeresults count=4 | streamstats count as row | eval search_name=case( row=1, "DefenseClaw - Recent Deny And Enforcement Activity", row=2, "OpenClaw - Recent Runtime Health Symptoms", row=3, "OpenClaw - Recent Run Attempts And Retries", row=4, "OpenClaw - Recent High Cost Or Slow Runs" ), purpose=case( row=1, "Audit-driven triage for policy and enforcement activity.", row=2, "Gateway-driven troubleshooting for runtime degradation.", row=3, "Diagnostics-driven retry and stuck-session investigation.", row=4, "Metrics-driven cost and latency investigation." ) | table search_name purpose
